sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33146" key="e)kfantori/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκφαντ-ορία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n33146.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">revealing of secret things</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
